title: Obsidian Research Project with Claude Code
first_prompt: Can I open Claude Code in a Obsidian directory and have it create .MD files for a writing/research project?
summary: Irwin was trying to establish a reliable workflow for using Claude Code within an Obsidian vault, ensuring that all generated research and writing files adhered to specific Obsidian formatting and naming conventions. The conversation progressed from confirming the technical feasibility of this setup to the specific request for a guiding file. The assistant confirmed this capability and began generating a comprehensive `claude.md` file designed to instruct Claude Code on Obsidian best practices.
